recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Alien Abduction: Incident in Lake County
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious blackout, a son goes out to investigate and captures footage of actual aliens. When the aliens follow he and his brothers back to their home all hell breaks lose.

recommendations.title: Monster Hunters
recommendations.overview: When an alien prison ship crash lands and unleashes creature after creature in the California desert, they make quick work of the army that tries to stop them. Now, the only hope of stopping the aliens rests with a secret branch of the government spe

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: GANTZ:O
recommendations.overview: After being brutally murdered in a subway station, a teen boy awakens to find himself resurrected by a strange computer named Gantz, and forced to fight a large force of invading aliens in Osaka.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes
recommendations.overview: A cafe owner discovers that the TV in his cafe suddenly shows images from the future, but only two minutes into the future.

recommendations.title: They Live
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter stumbles upon a unique pair of sunglasses that reveal aliens are systematically gaining control of the Earth by masquerading as humans and lulling the public into submission.

recommendations.title: Easy Rider
recommendations.overview: Wyatt and Billy, two Harley-riding hippies, complete a drug deal in Southern California and decide to travel cross-country in search of spiritual truth.

recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Sam Was Here
recommendations.overview: California, Mojave Desert, 1998. A strange glow appears in the sky. Sam, a forty-something door-to-door salesman, travels through the few inhabited zones of the Californian desert in search of clients.
